title: India's Spice Exports Hit Record $4.4 Billion in 2025–26
description: India's spice exports reached an all-time high of USD 4.4 billion in 2025–26, led by chilli, cumin, and turmeric.

title: Basmati Rice Exports Cross $5.8 Billion in FY 2025–26
description: India's basmati rice exports surpassed USD 5.8 billion in FY 2025–26, driven by strong demand from Iran, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE.

title: India Maize Exports Reach 4.2 Million MT in FY 2025–26
description: Indian maize exports rose to 4.2 million MT in FY 2025–26, with Bangladesh, Vietnam and South Korea as top buyers.

title: India–UAE CEPA Drives 38% Growth in Rice Exports to UAE
description: Rice exports to UAE grew 38% year-on-year following CEPA zero-duty benefit. Cumulative value reached $1.2 billion in FY 2025–26.

title: Cumin Prices Stabilise at ₹22,000/Quintal After 2024 Volatility
description: Cumin prices in Unjha mandi stabilised at ₹21,500–22,500/quintal in June 2026 after bumper Gujarat crop.
